day_trace.speech:
Logical inventory:
1. In the last round of voting, the behavior patterns of each character showed significant randomness, and identity information was still opaque.
2. All parties on the court accused them of being too emotional and there was serious secondary pollution of the information.

Position reiterated:
- Refuse to believe accusations without cross-verification.
- Ask all parties to clearly state the identity path to identify real information vulnerabilities.
- If Twister cannot reveal his identity, he will be the first to be excluded.
